<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band08_chunk007.pdf#page=20 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band08 p338 -->

<!-- header: ZANGBERG -->

<!-- header: ZANGBER -->


[[File:Band08_chunk007_p020_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band08_chunk007_p020_img002.jpg|thumb|E_ Säule]]



[[File:Band08_chunk007_p020_img003.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band08_chunk007_p020_img004.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band08_chunk007_p020_img005.jpg|thumb|E. Bienenkörbe]]



[[File:Band08_chunk007_p020_img006.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band08_chunk007_p020_img007.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band08_chunk007_p020_img008.jpg|thumb|E<sub>8</sub> Weinstock rankt um Ulm]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band08 p339 -->
